name: D1 Get Started
description:
A Cloudflare Workers starter template demonstrating D1 database integration,
blockchain webhook handling, and TypeScript data structure implementations.
Includes AI coding-agent instructions for GitHub Copilot and Codex covering
project conventions, D1 query patterns, API security, testing, and deployment.
creator: Pjrich1313

components.description: AI coding-agent instructions (Codex / AGENTS.md format) covering project setup, coding conventions, D1 database patterns, API security, testing, and deployment.
GitHub Copilot instructions covering the full tech stack, coding conventions, D1 query patterns, response patterns, testing patterns, security best practices, and development workflow.

provenance.note: Starter template for Cloudflare D1 and Workers with AI agent instructions authored for the d1-get-started project.
